_comment: HUMAN-OWNED. Refereed works in the ORCID record that are DELIBERATELY not listed on the printed CV (cv/cv_rosen.typ). scripts/cv/check.mjs reads this so an intentional omission does not fail the reconciliation gate. Match by DOI; add a reason.

omit.title: Very Massive Stars in the local Universe
omit.reason: IAU proceedings (Highlights of Astronomy) — ORCID types it journal-article, but it is conference proceedings, which the CV omits (cf. the conference-paper policy in src/data/publications.exclude.json).
